name: log-hygiene-sanitizer
description: Static Cloudflare Pages app for local browser-based log sanitization.

scripts.build: node --check app.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const files=['index.html','styles.css','app.js','_headers']; for (const file of files) fs.accessSync(file); fs.rmSync('dist', {recursive: true, force: true}); fs.mkdirSync('dist/examples', {recursive: true}); for (const file of files) fs.copyFileSync(file, 'dist/' + file); fs.cpSync('examples', 'dist/examples', {recursive: true});"
